classicNoisedeck/bitEffects#desc: Bit field and bit mask effects
classicNoisedeck/caustic#desc: Dual-noise caustic pattern with reflect blend
classicNoisedeck/moodscape#desc: Refracted value noise with multiple color modes
filter/bc#desc: Deprecated: use 'adjust' instead. Adjust brightness and/or contrast
filter/bloom#desc: Multi-pass bloom with bright-pass extraction and configurable glow
filter/blur#desc: Gaussian blur with separate X and Y radius controls
filter/celShading#desc: Cartoon-style shading with posterization and outlines
filter/channel#desc: Channel isolation (r, g, b, or a)
filter/chroma#desc: Isolate specific hue range with feathering
filter/chromaticAberration#desc: Color fringing effect simulating lens aberration
filter/colorReplace#desc: Color replacement with alpha output. Matches pixels near targetColor and remaps their RGB and/or alpha.
filter/colorspace#desc: Deprecated: use 'adjust' instead. Interpret RGB as HSV, OKLab, or OKLCH and convert
filter/convolutionFeedback#desc: Convolution feedback with blur and sharpen
filter/dither#desc: Ordered dithering with classic patterns and palettes
filter/emboss#desc: Emboss effect creating raised relief appearance
filter/feedback#desc: Feedback loop with blend modes and transforms
filter/glyphMap#desc: ASCII/glyph art conversion using procedural glyphs
filter/hs#desc: Deprecated: use 'adjust' instead. Adjust hue and/or saturation
filter/lightLeak#desc: Film light leak overlay with colorful Voronoi regions
filter/lowPoly#desc: Low-polygon style render using Voronoi cells
filter/motionBlur#desc: Simple motion blur via frame blending
filter/palette#desc: Apply cosine color palettes based on luminance
filter/smooth#desc: Anti-aliasing with MSAA, SMAA, or edge-selective blur modes
filter/temporalAberration#desc: Chromatic aberration via per-channel temporal frame delay
filter/tetraColorArray#desc: Apply Tetra color array palettes based on luminance
filter/tetraCosine#desc: Apply Tetra cosine palettes based on luminance
filter/tint#desc: Colorize input texture with a color overlay
filter/translate#desc: Translate image in X and Y
filter/tunnel#desc: Perspective tunnel effect with shape options
filter3d/palette3d#desc: Apply cosine color palettes to a 3D volume based on luminance
mixer/applyMode#desc: Apply brightness, hue, or saturation from source B to source A
mixer/blendMode#desc: Blend two inputs using selectable blend mode
mixer/cellSplit#desc: Split between inputs using Voronoi cell regions
mixer/centerMask#desc: Blend from edges (A) into center (B) using a distance mask
mixer/channelCombine#desc: Combine separate surface inputs into R, G, B channels
mixer/distortion#desc: Displace, reflect, and refract with two surfaces
mixer/focusBlur#desc: Focus blur using luminance depth map
mixer/mashup#desc: Posterize a control input by luminance and route each band to a different surface
mixer/shadow#desc: Cast a shadow or glow from one input onto another
mixer/shapeMask#desc: Composite inputs inside and outside a geometric shape
mixer/uvRemap#desc: Remap UVs of one input using color channels of another
points/attractor#desc: Strange attractors: chaotic dynamic systems visualization
points/buddhabrot#desc: Buddhabrot fractal via progressive orbit accumulation
points/flow#desc: Agent-based luminosity flow field with behaviors
points/physical#desc: Physics-based particle simulation with wind and gravity forces
render/loopBegin#desc: Start accumulator loop, read from feedback buffer
render/loopEnd#desc: End accumulator loop, write back to feedback buffer
render/meshLoader#desc: Load mesh data from OBJ files into GPU textures.
render/pointsEmit#desc: Initialize and maintain agent state for particle systems
render/pointsRender#desc: Blend agent trails with input for particle systems
render/renderCubemap3d#desc: Render a 3D volume into cubemap faces (lit isosurface/voxel)
render/renderCubemapSurface#desc: Sample a 3D volume into cubemap faces (raw true color, no lighting)
render/renderLit3d#desc: Universal 3D volume raymarcher with advanced lighting
synth/bitwise#desc: Bitwise operation patterns (XOR squares, AND, OR, etc.)
synth/gabor#desc: Anisotropic bandlimited noise via sparse Gabor convolution
synth/gradient#desc: Multi-color gradient generator with various styles
synth/julia#desc: Julia set explorer with deep zoom
synth/newton#desc: Newton fractal explorer with deep zoom
synth/noise#desc: Value noise with multiple interpolation types
synth/remap#desc: Polygon zones routed to engine surfaces (companion to the Remap zone-editor app)
synth/testPattern#desc: Test patterns for debugging and calibration
